title: [NoRWX] Proof-of-Concept
purpose: Demonstrates running position-independent (PIC) x86-64 machine code to output "Hello World" in RW-only memory, without marking it executable.
features: Windows API calls from emulated code

title: [cpp-pic] Position-Independent Runtime
purpose: A C++23 framework enabling shellcode and position-independent code generation across multiple platforms and architectures.
features: Multi-platform (Windows, Linux, UEFI) and multi-architecture (i386, x86_64, armv7a, aarch64)
TLS 1.3 with certificate verification, DNS, HTTP, WebSocket
technologies: C++23, Windows PEB/NTAPI, Linux syscalls, UEFI
audience: Security researchers, systems programmers, embedded developers

title: [EC] Armenian Encoding Converter
purpose: Converts Armenian text between multiple encodings (ANSI, Unicode, ArmSCII, etc.).
audience: Linguists, developers dealing with Armenian text, localization engineers
